scripts.migrate: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/run_migrations.sh', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit', cwd: process.cwd() })"
scripts.seed: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/run_seed_local.sh seeds/001_rbac_seed.sql', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.seed:remote: node -e "process.env.ZAP_ALLOW_REMOTE_SEED='1'; require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/run_seed_local.sh seeds/001_rbac_seed.sql', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.seed:forms: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/run_seed_local.sh seeds/002_forms_seed.sql', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.seed:zap: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/run_seed_local.sh seeds/003_zap_from_xlsx.sql', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.seed:ecraft: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync('bash scripts/run_seed_local.sh seeds/004_rbac_ecraft_permissions.sql',{env:process.env,stdio:'inherit'}); execSync('bash scripts/run_seed_local.sh seeds/005_ecraft_defaults.sql',{env:process.env,stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.seed:outbound-po: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('node scripts/seed-outbound-po.mjs', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.seed:sample: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/load_sample_data.sh', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.seed:sample:replace: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('bash scripts/load_sample_data.sh --replace', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.sync:sheets: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); require('child_process').execSync('node scripts/sync-sheets.mjs', { env: process.env, stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.test:db: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); require('dotenv').config(); const pg=require('pg'); const c=new pg.Client({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}); c.connect().then(()=>c.query('SELECT 1 AS ok')).then(r=>{console.log('PG OK:',r.rows[0]);c.end();}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message);process.exit(1);})"
scripts.test: tsx --test --import ./tests/setup.mjs tests/unit/pagination.test.ts tests/unit/rbac.test.ts tests/unit/errors.test.ts tests/unit/sku-display.test.ts tests/unit/secondary-listings-merge.test.mjs tests/unit/grn-debit-note-helpers.test.ts tests/unit/grn-line-quantity-validation.test.ts tests/unit/inbound-po-grn-pending-ui.test.ts tests/unit/inbound-journey-ui-lib.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-po-types.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-po-listing-spreadsheet.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-po-listing-normalize.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-po-listings-preview.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-po-sku-report.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-po-wip.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-po-acknowledgement.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-consignment-packing-spreadsheet.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-consignment-line-drafts.test.ts tests/unit/outbound-po-packing-skus.test.ts tests/unit/po-detail-header-mapping.test.ts tests/unit/inbound-po-detail-ui.test.ts tests/unit/dashboard-card-filters.test.ts tests/unit/po-grn-merge.test.ts tests/unit/id-display.test.ts tests/unit/inbound-grn-close-ui.test.ts tests/unit/inbound-grn-workflow.test.ts tests/api/integration.test.mjs tests/api/inbound-grn-flow.test.mjs tests/api/inbound-journey-integration.test.mjs tests/api/outbound-consignment-invoice.test.mjs tests/api/outbound-purchase-order.test.mjs
